title: rubus ligulatus
intro: Rubus ligulatus, also known as the Himalayan blackberry or Indian raspberry, is a type of flowering plant in the rose family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus ligulatus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
